name: AHLSTROM-MUNKSJO OYJ AHLSTROM-M
summary: Ahlstrom-Munksjö Oyj is a global leader in sustainable and innovative fiber-based solutions, supplying specialty papers and nonwovens. Their products are used in a wide range of applications, including filtration, food and beverage processing, life science, and building materials. The company is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.
